member.name: T:DelegateContractId
member.summary: The ID for a smart contract instance on Hedera.

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.param:
the num portion of the contract id
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.param: the shard portion of the contract id
the realm portion of the contract id
the num portion of the contract id

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.DelegateContractId(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.param: the shard portion of the contract id
the realm portion of the contract id
the num portion of the contract id

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a delegate contract id from a string.

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.FromSolidityAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Create a delegate contract id from a string.

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.FromEvmAddress(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Parse DelegateContract id from an ethereum address.

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.FromProtobuf(Proto.ContractID)
member.summary: Create a delegate contract id from a string.

member.name: M:DelegateContractId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a delegate contract id from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf
